name: jobflow-for-codex
description: A local job-search workflow plugin for Codex with screening rules, ledgers, reports, and automation prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Run a browser-assisted job-search workflow with local records and reports.
interface.longDescription: JobFlow for Codex packages a reusable job-search assistant workflow. It helps initialize private job-search data, apply screening rules, maintain a local JSONL ledger, generate daily reports, and build reviewed automation prompts while keeping user judgment and platform safety checks in the loop.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me initialize and run JobFlow for my job search.
